negative_prompt: The video captures a series of frames showing ugly scenes, static with no motion, motion blur, over-saturation, shaky footage, low resolution, grainy texture, pixelated images, poorly lit areas, underexposed and overexposed scenes, poor color balance, washed out colors, choppy sequences, jerky movements, low frame rate, artifacting, color banding, unnatural transitions, outdated special effects, fake elements, unconvincing visuals, poorly edited content, jump cuts, visual noise, and flickering. Overall, the video is of poor quality.
name: av_585591ae-87f8-407c-8271-355765512a4d
prompt: The video begins with a view from inside a vehicle, likely captured by a dashboard camera, showing a multi-lane urban road during what appears to be early morning or late afternoon, judging by the soft, diffused lighting. The sky is overcast, casting a muted light over the scene. A few vehicles are also seen moving on the other side of the road. On the right side of the road, there's a large brick building with numerous windows, some of which have greenery at their bases. A concrete barrier separates the lanes, and further down the road, modern glass buildings can be seen in the background. A white truck labeled "got milk?" is prominently visible ahead in the same lane as the ego vehicle, but remains stationary throughout the video. Other cars, including a blue sedan directly in front, are also present on the road.  As the video progresses, the rear lights of the stationary white truck labeled "got milk?" become clearly visible and appear prominently as the ego vehicle moves closer. The ego vehicle then makes two consecutive right lane changes, transitioning from the leftmost lane into the rightmost lane, passing by the stationary truck. The blue sedan ahead of the ego vehicle also remains stationary throughout the sequence and does not change lanes. The surrounding environment remains consistent with the large brick building and modern glass structures in the background appearing static. A reflection of the "got milk?" truck is visible on the bonnet and windshield of the ego vehicle during the video.  By the end of the video, the white truck labeled "got milk?" remains stationary in its lane, while the ego vehicle has moved past it and continues down the road. The blue sedan that was initially in front of the ego vehicle remains in its original position in the left lane throughout the video. Additionally, a "right-turn only" lane marker is visible on the surface of the road, and red traffic lights are seen at the end of the video. No vehicles in the video collide with each other at any point. The overall scene remains largely unchanged, with the urban road, the large brick building, and the modern glass structures still visible in the background.
